title: Working out averages
instruction: Answer these questions about average prices.

questions.question: What does 'average price' mean?
options: The price in the middle shop

questions.question: Which sentence uses 'average' correctly?
options: The average price of milk is very cheap
The average price of milk in the UK is about £1.20
The average is always the lowest number
questions.answer: The average price of milk in the UK is about £1.20

questions.question: Mean, median, and mode are all types of ___.
Bread costs: £1.00, £1.20, £1.40. What is the mean (average) price?
A shopkeeper sold: 5 items on Monday, 3 on Tuesday, 7 on Wednesday. What is the mean number of items sold per day?
Prices of the same tin of tomatoes in 4 shops: 65p, 72p, 58p, 65p. What is the mean price?
